issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill provides code snippets but lacks realistic usage demonstrations.
The skill is specific to 3ds Max and V-Ray, limiting compatibility with other AI agents.

scenarios.name: configure-vray-interior-production
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric items, while Response B omits many required settings.

scenarios.name: setup-corona-production
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers more of the required settings, while Response B omits several key parameters.

scenarios.name: batch-network-render
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers most of the required API calls and logic, though it omits camera enumeration, whereas Response A is incomplete and stops short of implementing the core loop.
